description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a combination of black, gray, and blue synthetic materials with a white rubber sole. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, with blue and gray patterned laces threaded through metal eyelets. The lateral side displays a circular patch with a stylized logo and the word 'IMPERIAL' embossed below it, while the medial side is more minimal. The heel area is reinforced and features a blue ribbed accent, adding both style and support. The toe cap and side overlays are made of a darker, likely synthetic leather material, contrasting with the lighter gray panels. The overall construction suggests durability and urban style, suitable for everyday wear in city environments.
description: A high-top sneaker in black, gray, and blue with a white sole, padded collar, and logo details. Features patterned laces, reinforced heel, and stylish overlays for urban use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded collar, blue ribbed heel accent, and reinforced heel panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the circular logo patch, 'IMPERIAL' branding, and layered panel design.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the patterned laces, padded tongue with logo patch, and toe cap detailing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the clean panel design and blue ribbed heel accent without branding.
attribute_logo: Circular logo patch on the lateral ankle and rectangular logo patch on the tongue, both in gray/white.
